/opt/homebrew/opt/ccache/libexec/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.4.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o liblevelset_udf.dylib -install_name @rpath/liblevelset_udf.dylib CMakeFiles/exagoop_udf_lib.dir/Users/sreejith/Documents/01_Research/Code_Developments/ExaGOOP_Dev/Exec/my_test/my_geometry.cpp.o  /Users/sreejith/Documents/01_Research/Code_Developments/ExaGOOP_Dev/Build_Cmake/Submodules/amrex/Src/libamrex_2d.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/open-mpi/5.0.9/lib/libmpi.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libhdf5.320.1.1.dylib
